content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于<t:1757425800:F> 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯*50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2025年9月23日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
【战斗界面】
● 修复了「界域精通」描述不严谨的问题，修复后若当前队伍为「至纯深海」、「至纯血肉」或「至纯超维」之一时，界域精通效果翻倍。实际效果不变。
● 修复了混沌界域「深海共生」效果描述错误的问题，正确描述为「每有 1 名混沌唤醒体，基础触腕伤害提高最大生命的 1％」，实际效果不变。
● 修复了唤醒体「皮克曼」的技能「绘影摹形」关于造物移除时机文本描述存在歧义的问题，正确时机应为「下回合开始时」将其移除，实际效果不变。
● 修复了唤醒体「塔薇」的技能「纵贯时序之翼」的力量获取效果由于未能享受「力量增益加成」，文本描述数值低于预期的问题，实际效果不变。
● 修复了唤醒体「凯刻斯」超限爆发描述存在异常文本内容的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「旺达」释放狂气爆发时「深眠反击」选项的「梦引」描述缺乏标识的问题。
● 修复了卡牌拥有「回声」刻印时「消耗」词缀无法正常显示的问题。
● 修复了限时玩法「异界图卷」中  造物「异象调色盘」衍生卡描述有误的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「凯蒂古拉」的「活焰」特效会覆盖「冻结」、「封印」特效的问题。
● 修复了异梦视界「再见永无乡」中调换编队中唤醒体位置后有概率无法进入战斗关卡的问题。
 
【战斗逻辑】
● 修复了唤醒体「皮克曼」灵塑适性 2~3 级时效果与 1 级相比没有变化的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「塔薇」的技能「通晓万物之理」在激活启灵1「无穷智慧」后变化的卡牌算力消耗-1 效果在某些场合下未能生效的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「塔薇」的技能「通晓万物之理」变化为「命定之剑」时，无法享受经由释放钥令获取的额外力量倍率加成的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「莉兹」未激活启灵 1 时某些情况下「腐化绿炎」也能够升级为「死灭绿炎」的问题。
● 修复了技能「苦痛与欢愉」、「灵魂序曲」、「蚀骨色彩」无法受到忘却篇造物「诡术礼帽」算力改变效果影响的问题。
● 修复了命轮「被缚的歌谣」满层叠位时依然有极低概率打出「打击」后无法正确抽取卡牌的问题。
● 修复了怪物「小蜜蜂」的技能「啼鸣」未正确施加中毒效果的问题。
● 修复了「忘却篇」调查关卡「困难9-11」中的普通战斗错误的被判定为「首领战」的问题。
 
【相位对弈】
● 修复了「相位对弈」对战时无法查看对手出牌的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」中唤醒体「卡茜亚」无法正确获得衍生卡的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」中唤醒体「皮克曼」的技能「幻梦绘生」未正确造成直接伤害的问题。
● 修复了第二次打开「相位对弈」，每周试炼显示消失的问题。
 
【其他】
● 修复了部分场景释放某些技能时有异常强烈发光的问题。
● 修复了「派遣」中一键领取任务奖励后手动派遣快捷上阵唤醒体异常的问题。

V2.3.2.1 Online Maintenance Announcement

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on <t:1757425800:F> . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
 
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver*50
 
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on September 23, 2025 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
 
[Update Content]
[Battle Interface]
● Fixed the issue of vague description for "Realm Mastery." After the fix, if the current team is one of "Pure Aequor," "Pure Caro," or "Pure Ultra," the effect of Realm Mastery will be doubled. The actual effect remains unchanged.
● Fixed the description error for the "Aequor Symbiosis" effect in the Chaos Realm, correctly stating that "For each Chaos Awakener, base Tentacle DMG increases by 1% of max HP," with no change to the actual effect.
● Fixed the ambiguous text description regarding the removal timing of the skill "Lifelike Rendition" of the Awakener "Pickman." The correct timing should be "at the start of the next turn," while the actual effect remains unchanged.
● Fixed the issue where the Strength gain effect of the Awakener "Tawil"'s skill "Pinions of Time" did not benefit from the "Strength Bonus," resulting in a lower-than-expected value in the text description, while the actual effect remains unchanged.
● Fixed the issue with abnormal text content in the description of Awakener "Caecus" Over-Exaltation.
● Fixed the issue where the "Dreamlure" description for the "Slumber Counter" option was missing an identifier when the Awakener "Wanda" unleashed Exalt.
● Fixed the issue where the "Consumes" affix could not be displayed correctly when the card had the "Echo" Orison.

● Fixed the issue with the description of the Derived Card "Twisted Palette" in the limited-time game mode "Otherworld Scroll."
● Fixed the issue where the "Fiamma" effect of the Awakener "Kathigu-Ra" would override the "Freeze" and "Sealed" effects.
● Fixed an issue in Dreamscape "Farewell Neverland" where there was a chance that the team could not enter the battle stage after swapping the positions of Awakeners in the lineup.

[Battle Logic]
● Fixed the issue where the Soulforge Aptitude effects of the Awakener "Pickman" did not change between levels 2-3 compared to level 1.
● Fixed an issue where the effect of the Awakener "Tawil"'s skill "Omniscient Verity," which reduces the Arithmetica cost of changed cards by 1 after activating Enlighten 1 "Boundless Sagacity," did not apply in certain situations.
● Fixed an issue where the Awakener "Tawil's" skill "Omniscient Verity" could not benefit from the bonus STR multiplier gained through releasing the Posse when it changed to "Predetermined Strike."
● Fixed an issue where "Corrupted Flames" could upgrade to "Deadly Flames" in certain situations when the Awakener "Liz" had not activated Enlighten Level 1.
● Fixed the issue where the skills "Pain and Pleasure," "Soul Overture," and "Chromaphage" could not be affected by the Arithmetica change effect of the relic "Trickster's Hat" from the Faded Legacy.
● Fixed the issue where the Wheel of Destiny "Song of the Bound" could still have an extremely low chance of not drawing cards correctly after playing "Strike" when at maximum Ascension.
● Fixed the issue where the monster "Little Bee" skill "Cry" did not properly apply Poison effects.
● Fixed the issue where normal battles in "Operation" Chapter "Hard 9-11" of "Faded Legacy" were incorrectly classified as "Boss Battles."

[Traphase]
● Fixed the issue where players could not view their rival's card plays during Traphase battles.
● Fixed the issue where the Awakener "Casiah" could not correctly obtain Derived Cards in "Traphase".
● Fixed the issue where the Awakener "Pickman" skill "Phantasmal Life Drawing" did not correctly deal direct damage in "Traphase".
● Fixed the issue where the Weekly Trials display disappeared after the second opening of "Traphase."

[Other]
● Fixed the issue of abnormal strong lighting when releasing certain skills in some scenes.
● Fixed the issue where manually assigning the Awakener using the quick deployment after claiming task rewards in "Assignment" would malfunction.
